title: ApiApplication
description: Settings for an application that implements a web API

acceptMappedClaims.description: Allows an application to use claims mapping without specifying a custom signing key

knownClientApplications.description: Used for bundling consent. Lists client app IDs that are considered known clients of this API

oauth2PermissionScopes.description: OAuth 2.0 permission scopes exposed by the web API to client applications

preAuthorizedApplications.description: Lists client applications pre-authorized with specified delegated permissions that do not require user consent

requestedAccessTokenVersion.description: Specifies the access token version expected by the resource. Possible values are 1 or 2.
